tests.description: [smoke] generate skill output path and eval creation

assert.value: const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); data.status === 'generated' && (data.skipped === undefined || typeof data.skipped === 'boolean') && (data.commit_summary === undefined || typeof data.commit_summary === 'string') && (data.version_bump === undefined || ['major','minor','patch','none'].includes(data.version_bump)) && (data.call_trace === undefined || Array.isArray(data.call_trace))
